ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "population_2015" REAL /* Population of the neighborhood in 2015 */,
  "population_2020" REAL /* Population of the neighborhood in 2020 */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate of the neighborhood */,
  "active_living" INTEGER /* Number of active living facilities in the neighborhood */,
  "community_space" INTEGER /* Number of community spaces in the neighborhood */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Number of educational institutions in the neighborhood */,
  "food_choices" INTEGER /* Number of food choices available in the neighborhood */,
  "health_wellbeing" INTEGER /* Number of health and wellbeing services in the neighborhood */,
  "mobility" INTEGER /* Number of mobility options in the neighborhood */,
  "nightlife" INTEGER /* Number of nightlife activities in the neighborhood */,
  "geocode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geocode of the neighborhood */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the neighborhood */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the neighborhood */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the city table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighborhood data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighborhood data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_geocode_id FOREIGN KEY ("geocode_id") REFERENCES geocodes ("geocode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geocodes" (
  "geocode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geocode */,
  "geocode_name" TEXT /* Name of the geocode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geocode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the geocode data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the geocode data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geocode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the city */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Active Living, Community Space) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric category */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric in the neighborhood */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the metric value was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric value data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric value data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES metrics_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subcategory data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subcategory data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES metrics_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_subcategory_values" (
  "subcategory_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric subcategory value */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric subcategory */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric subcategory in the neighborhood */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the metric subcategory value was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric subcategory value data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric subcategory value data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_subcategory_values_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_subcategory_values_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES metric_subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the neighborhood data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
